description.en: Search for businesses and places on Google Maps by text query. Returns name, address, phone number, website, rating, and review count.
description.de: Suche nach Unternehmen und Orten auf Google Maps per Textsuche. Gibt Name, Adresse, Telefonnummer, Website, Bewertung und Anzahl der Bewertungen zurück.
description.es: Search for businesses and places on Google Maps by text query. Returns name, address, phone number, website, rating, and review count.
description.fr: Search for businesses and places on Google Maps by text query. Returns name, address, phone number, website, rating, and review count.
description.ro: Search for businesses and places on Google Maps by text query. Returns name, address, phone number, website, rating, and review count.
description.it: Search for businesses and places on Google Maps by text query. Returns name, address, phone number, website, rating, and review count.

vars.API_KEY: env:GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Google Cloud Console at console.cloud.google.com. Enable the Places API (New).

description.en: The text query to search for (e.g. 'barbers in Vienna Austria', 'dentists in Graz').
description.de: Der Suchbegriff (z.B. 'Friseure in Wien', 'Zahnarzt in Graz').
description.es: The text query to search for (e.g. 'barbers in Vienna Austria', 'dentists in Graz').
description.fr: The text query to search for (e.g. 'barbers in Vienna Austria', 'dentists in Graz').
description.ro: The text query to search for (e.g. 'barbers in Vienna Austria', 'dentists in Graz').
description.it: The text query to search for (e.g. 'barbers in Vienna Austria', 'dentists in Graz').

description.en: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to bias results (e.g. AT for Austria, DE for Germany).
description.de: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 Ländercode zur Einschränkung der Ergebnisse (z.B. AT für Österreich).
description.es: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to bias results (e.g. AT for Austria, DE for Germany).
description.fr: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to bias results (e.g. AT for Austria, DE for Germany).
description.ro: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to bias results (e.g. AT for Austria, DE for Germany).
description.it: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to bias results (e.g. AT for Austria, DE for Germany).

description.en: Language code for results (e.g. de, en).
description.de: Sprachcode für die Ergebnisse (z.B. de, en).
description.es: Language code for results (e.g. de, en).
description.fr: Language code for results (e.g. de, en).
description.ro: Language code for results (e.g. de, en).
description.it: Language code for results (e.g. de, en).

description.en: Token from a previous search to fetch the next page of results.
description.de: Token aus einer vorherigen Suche zum Abrufen der nächsten Ergebnisseite.
description.es: Token from a previous search to fetch the next page of results.
description.fr: Token from a previous search to fetch the next page of results.
description.ro: Token from a previous search to fetch the next page of results.
description.it: Token from a previous search to fetch the next page of results.
